title: Future markers: demain, bientôt, la semaine prochaine
subtitle: Make plans sound clear.
duolingoBridge: Useful beside Duolingo plans, travel, and future proche sentences.
overview: Knowledge point 1: time markers make future plans easy.
Knowledge point 2: use aller + infinitive for near future.

items.en: Tomorrow, I am going to study.

items.fr: Ce soir, nous allons manger ici.
items.en: Tonight, we are going to eat here.
items.es: Esta noche vamos a comer aquí.

items.en: I am going to leave soon.

items.fr: La semaine prochaine, je vais travailler.
items.en: Next week, I am going to work.
items.es: La próxima semana voy a trabajar.

items.en: I am going to call later.
